_README: Outbound ICP seed list. Each entry produces one personalized cold-email draft per generation cycle.
domain        — primary domain, used for subtle research cue (e.g. 'nibir.in')
industry      — one of the keys in HOOK_BY_INDUSTRY in outbound-draft.mjs
painSignal    — one observed signal that justifies cold contact (e.g. 'expanded to 3 new branches in Q1')
notes         — free-form, NOT included in email — your private context only
REPLACE THESE EXAMPLES WITH YOUR ACTUAL ICPS BEFORE THE FIRST GENERATION CYCLE.
Compliance: respect DPDP (India), GDPR (EU), CAN-SPAM (US). Drafts are NOT auto-sent — you review every one.
